title: phyllorkis guttulata
intro: Phyllorkis guttulata, also known as the yellow pimpernel, is a plant species belonging to the orchid family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phyllorkis guttulata include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory ailments. Phyllorkis guttulata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
